message:
⚡ Lazy-load DashboardCustomizer to reduce initial bundle (#10303)

DashboardCustomizer is only rendered when the user opens the
customizer modal, but it was eagerly imported — pulling in
CardFactoryModal, StatBlockFactoryModal, template strings, and
the dynamic card compiler on every dashboard load.

Wrap it in safeLazy() so the entire subtree is deferred until
the user actually opens the customizer.

Fixes #10301

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
